generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following this strategic autonomy debate closely. It's clear that our allies aren't pulling their weight in defense spending. We can't keep relying on others to protect our interests. It's time to invest in our own security and preparedness. Look at how other countries are prioritizing their sovereignty - we should too. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
